summary: Bulk update project details for company users on projects
description: This endpoint allows company users to bulk update their project details on multiple projects. Users must already be assigned to the project before their project details (roles, permission templates) can be updated.

entities.description: One key for each user ID passed in, with an array of project IDs for that nested user ID

users.description: Array of existing company users with a permission template id, project_role_ids, and project id that they want updated. The maximum amount per request is 1000 user_id, project_id, project_role_ids,...

user_id.description: The ID of the user update

project_id.description: The ID of user's project to update

permission_template_id.description: The ID of the permission template to update for the user

project_role_ids.description: An array of project role IDs to assign to the user for the project
